asr.xifan.doubao.title: Doubao Speech to Text
asr.xifan.doubao.description: Use the Doubao / Volcengine fast file recognition API for cloud ASR.
asr.xifan.elevenlabs.title: ElevenLabs Speech to Text
asr.xifan.elevenlabs.description: Use the ElevenLabs speech-to-text API for cloud ASR.
asr.xifan.openai-compatible.title: OpenAI-Compatible Speech to Text
asr.xifan.openai-compatible.description: Use an OpenAI-compatible /v1/audio/transcriptions endpoint for cloud ASR.
adaptor.xifan.mtranserver-proxy.title: MTranServer Proxy
adaptor.xifan.mtranserver-proxy.descript: Expose MTranServer through an OpenAI-compatible local proxy.
model.sherpa-onnx.dolphin-base-ctc-multi: ByteDance Dolphin Base multilingual CTC model at about 77 MB, supporting Chinese, English, and more.
model.sherpa-onnx.sense-voice-zh-en-ja-k: Alibaba FunASR SenseVoice multilingual model with Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and Cantonese support, quantized to int8.
model.sherpa-onnx.sense-voice-funasr-nan: Alibaba FunASR Nano speech model with broad multilingual and dialect coverage, optimized for far-field and noisy input.
model.sherpa-onnx.paraformer-zh-small.de: Compact Alibaba Paraformer Chinese model at about 78 MB, suitable for resource-constrained setups.
model.sherpa-onnx.paraformer-zh-2023-09-: Alibaba Paraformer Chinese model at about 223 MB, suitable for Chinese speech recognition.
model.sherpa-onnx.paraformer-zh-int8-202: Latest Alibaba Paraformer Chinese model at about 218 MB with int8 quantization.
model.sherpa-onnx.zipformer-multi-zh-han: Zipformer transducer model for Mandarin and multiple Chinese dialects, with hotword support.
model.sherpa-onnx.zipformer-zh-en.title: Zipformer Chinese-English Bilingual
model.sherpa-onnx.zipformer-zh-en.descri: Bilingual Zipformer transducer model for both Chinese and English, with hotword support.
